expectedEnglishHeadingsAndWords.Text: Or I WILL BE WHAT I WILL BE
Cited in Matthew 5:43, Matthew 19:19, Matthew 22:39, Mark 12:31, Luke 10:27, Romans 13:9, Galatians 5:14, and James 2:8
Or The LORD our God is One LORD or The LORD is our God, the LORD is One or The LORD is our God, the LORD alone; cited in Mark 12:29
Cited in Matthew 22:37, Mark 12:30, and Luke 10:27
